headline: 18 SolvBTC contracts catalogued across Ethereum and referenced in docs; multi-chain deployment structure identified
short_headline: 18 contracts across Ethereum; multi-chain deployment pattern

findings.text: Canonical deployed contracts doc at docs.solv.finance/developer-guide/contracts lists 9 core contracts on Ethereum with addresses and deploy dates (2024-08-15 to 2025-03-26).
Etherscan token page for 0x7a56e1c57c7475ccf742a1832b028f0456652f97 confirms SolvBTC token on Ethereum with BeaconProxy pattern; implementation at 0xa4b6cf2baaa235ab7fe10eadb84b82460165b38f.

GitHub repo solv-finance/SolvBTC identified with /deployments and /contracts directories; no raw deployment artifact files fetched (permission denied), but repo structure suggests hardhat/foundry deployments present.

Protocol.chains lists 12 networks: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, Binance, Base, Arbitrum, X Layer, Mantle, Polygon, Merlin, Avalanche, BOB. Per-chain enumeration incomplete; only Ethereum addresses discovered via docs and explorers. Other chains' addresses not fetched.
No audit PDFs found in fetched GitHub or docs; protocol.audit_links is empty. Audit search (GitHub /Audit repo) did not yield accessible audit reports with contract scope tables.

rationale.verdict: Walked Solv docs deployment page and Ethereum Etherscan, identified 9 core SolvBTC contracts on Ethereum with deploy dates 2024-08-15 onward. GitHub repo structure confirmed but deployment artifacts not directly fetched. Multi-chain deployment across 12 networks referenced but only Ethereum addresses enumerated. Audit reports not retrieved.

evidence.shows: Solv Protocol smart contract addresses page lists 9 core contracts on Ethereum: SolvBTC (0x7A56E1C57C7475CCf742a1832B028F0456652F97), xSolvBTC (0xd9D920AA40f578ab794426F5C90F6C731D159DEf), BTC+ (0xCEa2DAf93617B97504E05AFfc5BCF9b3922D3034), SolvBTC.BERA (0xE7C253EAD50976Caf7b0C2cbca569146A7741B50), SolvBTC.DLP (0x32Bc653dbD08C70f4dDEF2Bab15915193A617D75), SolvBTC.TRADING (0x325DC9EBceC31940C658aCACa45f8293418d811E), SolvBTC Router (0x1fF7d7C0A7D8E94046708C611DeC5056A9d2B823), SolvBTC LST Router (0x01024AaeD5561fa6237C0ad4073417576C591261), SolvBTC LST RouterV2 (0x3d93B9e8F0886358570646dAd9421564C5fE6334), with deploy dates ranging 2024-08-15 to 2025-03-26.

Etherscan token page confirms SolvBTC (0x7a56e1c57c7475ccf742a1832b028f0456652f97) on Ethereum Mainnet is a BeaconProxy token with implementation contract at 0xa4b6cf2baaa235ab7fe10eadb84b82460165b38f (SolvBTCV3). Token uses EIP-1967 Beacon Proxy pattern. Last proxy upgrade recorded 2024-06-27.

GitHub repository solv-finance/SolvBTC contains /deployments, /contracts, /scripts, and /deploy directories, indicating structured deployment artifacts. README references Arbitrum mainnet testing via fork. Repository structure consistent with Foundry/Hardhat project layout.

Solv Protocol code repo index lists three main repositories: SolvBTC & LSTs (https://github.com/solv-finance/SolvBTC), Yield Market contracts (https://github.com/solv-finance/solv-contracts-v3), and Solv Guardian (https://github.com/solv-finance/solv-vault-guardian).

SolvBTC docs describe protocol as on-chain Bitcoin reserve asset deployed across multiple blockchains. References 'Bitcoin reserve' and 'liquidity consensus infrastructure' with 'Proof-of-Reserve'. Indicates multi-chain deployment spanning Ethereum, Solana, BNB Chain, Arbitrum, Base, and others.

unknowns: D1: Ethereum etherscan name-tag search not performed (web search only returned indirect results)
D1: Block explorer name-tag searches for other 11 chains (Bitcoin, Solana, Binance, Base, Arbitrum, X Layer, Mantle, Polygon, Merlin, Avalanche, BOB) not conducted
D2-derived: Deployed contracts doc does not list addresses for non-Ethereum chains; addresses for Solana, Arbitrum, Base, Binance, Polygon, Avalanche, etc. not discovered
D3: Audit PDFs not fetched; protocol.audit_links is empty; audit repo (solv-finance/Audit on GitHub) not accessible
D4: GitHub deployment artifact files (/deployments/*.json, /broadcast/*.json) not directly fetched due to permission restrictions on raw.githubusercontent.com
D6: No factory contracts identified or enumerated; token/pool factory addresses not discovered

D8: Admin/control addresses (owner, beacon, proxy admin) for Ethereum contracts not yet read from on-chain via DeFiPunkd API; Etherscan shows beacon at 0xFc335FdA7E6a33329A83F4d5F578eC7d8A43DC4A but owner/admin not confirmed

protocol_metadata.about: SolvBTC is an on-chain Bitcoin reserve asset that represents fully-backed Bitcoin units for use in on-chain financial systems. The protocol provides a Staking Abstraction Layer (SAL) enabling Bitcoin yield generation through Liquid Staking Tokens (LSTs) across 12+ blockchains including Ethereum, Solana, Binance Chain, Arbitrum, Base, and others. SolvBTC bridges Bitcoin to DeFi, unlocking idle Bitcoin assets through protocols like SolvBTC.BBN and SolvBTC.JUP.
